markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, early SEO wins, and creative direction.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Early SEO Wins:** The blog is gaining traction, with the "cold calling scripts" article earning double the homepage's impressions. A Google-sourced lead booked a call, suggesting a direct ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [**New Creative Direction:** Growth X will replace the current clip art with a more distinct, AI-generated style (pixel art, abstract) to create a unique brand feel.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Podcast Article Workflow:** The new workflow is in development; the first article will cover the "Story of Triggify" and be added to the Content OS for integrated scheduling.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline Enrichment:** Growth X is scraping podcasts and webinars for \~20+ specific insights to improve article quality. The team will review the initial output for accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

## Topics

### Early SEO & Traffic Wins

  - [**Performance:** Early data (Sept–Oct) shows promising signals, with a detailed report due next week.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [The "effective cold calling scripts" article is a top performer, earning double the impressions of the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [A Google-sourced lead booked a call, potentially linked to blog traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [**Technical Progress:** All blog content is now indexed by Google, resolving a previous sitemap issue and making the content discoverable.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Future Goal Setting:** Growth X will establish 3- and 6-month traffic benchmarks to align on specific, measurable goals.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Podcast Article Workflow

  - [**Process:** Growth X is revising the workflow based on recent feedback. The first article, on the "Story of Triggify," is due by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Scheduling:** A new tab will be added to the Content OS to integrate podcast articles into the main publishing schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

### Creative Direction: Blog Images

  - [**Goal:** Replace generic clip art with a more distinct, AI-generated style to create a unique brand feel.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Feedback:** Ali favored two example styles:](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [A pixel art style.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [An abstract, colorful style.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [**Process:** The AI pipeline generates 5–6 image options per article, tailored to the content. The team will select one to embed in the final header.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### Content Pipeline Enrichment

  - [**Goal:** Improve article quality and specificity by incorporating direct insights from Understory's team.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [**Method:** Scraping podcasts and webinars for specific talking points.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**Podcasts:** \~20 insights pulled so far.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**Webinars:** The recent Adam Robinson webinar and a year-old conversation will be scraped.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [**Website:** The Understory site was scraped for product/service details.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [**Attribution:** Insights will be attributed to their source (e.g., specific podcast episode) to enable internal linking and cross-promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)

### Future Planning: Website Updates

  - [**Understory's Plan:** Update the main website in the coming weeks, including new case studies, service pages, and a style refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [**Growth X's Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
      - [**Content Refresh:** Begin updating older articles in \~6 months to maintain SEO authority.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
      - [**Process:** Articles will be refreshed on their existing URLs, not republished as new posts.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
      - [**Adaptation:** The content pipeline will be updated to reflect any changes to Understory's GTM strategy (e.g., expanding from LinkedIn ads to Meta/YouTube).](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)

      - [Deliver the "Story of Triggify" podcast article draft by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
      - [Add a podcast article tab to the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [Create 3- and 6-month traffic benchmarks.](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [**Ali:**](https://fathom.video/share/pq6dpyq_rtxQip2wFU_1xuPyxzFuxcj-?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
